deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code or rabbit gains a native always-on autonomous-agent mode that supersedes this skill
title: rabbit-auto-evolve loop state

defer_counts.description: Per-issue consecutive-defer counter (issue #423 Part B), keyed by issue-number string. Optional/additive (schema 1.1.0).

pending_post_merge.description: Merged PR numbers owed post-merge processing (phases 7-9, issue #499). Optional/additive (schema 1.2.0); cleared by run-post-merge.py once phases 7-9 complete.

decomposition_parents.description: Machine-readable decomposition parent->children linkage (issue #721). Keyed by parent issue-number string; value is the list of child sub-issue numbers filed for that parent at decomposition time. The loop's close-decomposed-parents phase enumerates a parent's children from this map (never a prose comment table) and closes the parent once every child is closed, then removes the parent key. Optional/additive (schema 1.3.0).
